    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What are the key specs to consider in a ThinkPad T480?
        Key specs to consider in the ThinkPad T480 include CPU type (i5 or i7), RAM size (4GB to 32GB), and storage options (HDD or SSD). Additionally, check the display type (HD or FHD) and whether it includes touchscreen functionality.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • How does battery life vary in the T480 models?
        Battery life in the T480 can vary based on the battery type used. Models come with either a 3-cell or 6-cell battery. The 6-cell typically offers longer usage time, potentially beneficial for users needing mobility without frequent recharging.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • What connectivity options does the T480 offer?
        The ThinkPad T480 offers various connectivity options including USB 3.1 ports, Thunderbolt 3, HDMI, an Ethernet dock, and a headphone/microphone combo jack. It also supports Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, enhancing its versatility for different user needs.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
